prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to Scotland as it discusses regulations and guidance relevant to charities operating across the UK, including those registered or active in Scotland. Additionally, it mentions engagement with statutory bodies that oversee charity operations in all UK nations.
